core_correction.channels_are: ratio readouts relative to the whole

code_changes.old_behavior: channels store + / - / nc as primary values
code_changes.new_behavior: channels store numeric ratios to whole; direction is metadata

code_changes.name: direction_4way
code_changes.purpose: Convert window delta vector into current 4-axis direction labels.

code_changes.name: compute_channel_ratios
code_changes.purpose: Compute ch1..ch7 as ratios of whole signal relation.
code_changes.code:
def compute_channel_ratios(w_delta, eps=1e-12):
    W1, W2, W3 = [abs(float(x)) for x in w_delta]

    raw = np.array([
        W1,
        W2,
        W3,
        W1 * W2,
        W1 * W3,
        W2 * W3,
        W1 * W2 * W3
    ], dtype=np.float64)

    whole = float(np.sum(raw) + eps)
    ratios = raw / whole

    return {
        'whole': whole,
        'raw_channels': raw.tolist(),
        'channel_ratios': ratios.tolist()
    }

details: After computing ticks or normalized deltas for W1/W2/W3, call compute_channel_ratios(ticks).
Store channel_ratios instead of symbolic + / - / nc as primary channel state.
Keep symbolic direction separately if useful.

code_changes.note: V_DOF now means total relational activity before normalization.

code_changes.title: Channel Ratios to Whole
code_changes.content: plot ch1_ratio through ch7_ratio over time

interpretation_rules.high_ch7: full W1-W2-W3 relation contributes strongly to whole
interpretation_rules.wandering_ratios: higher or externally driven DOF behavior

validation.expected: stable ratio pattern, likely low ch7 unless phase is strongly coupled
stronger pairwise relation channels and visible beat structure
unstable ratios and high whole activity variation
